name: smartify
description: Smartify persistent memory for Claude Code — connects to your Hivemind over MCP so Claude searches shared memory before answering and files each exchange after.

hivemind_id.title: Hivemind ID
hivemind_id.description: Your Hivemind id (starts with hm_). Copy it from the Smartify dashboard on the Connect or API keys page.

api_key.title: API key
api_key.description: A Smartify SDK key scoped to this Hivemind (sk_live_… or sk_test_…). Mint one in the dashboard under Settings → API keys.

api_base.title: API base URL
api_base.description: Smartify gateway base URL, including the /v1 suffix. Only change this for self-hosted or staging environments.
